summary: Tested Scout page access code gate feature. All 9 test scenarios passed. Access gate displays correctly with Lock icon, 'Scout Access' heading, input field with 'Enter access code' placeholder, 'Unlock Scout' button (disabled when empty), and 'Back to Home' link. Wrong code shows error message. Correct code 'FOMOFAM123' unlocks Scout page. sessionStorage persistence works - access persists across navigation within same session.
test_credentials: test@scout.com / test1234, Scout Access Code: FOMOFAM123
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scout access gate feature verified. ACCESS_CODE='FOMOFAM123' stored in sessionStorage under key 'fomofam_scout_access'. Gate shows Lock icon, 'Scout Access' heading, input with auto-uppercase, 'Unlock Scout' button (disabled when empty), 'Back to Home' link. Wrong code shows red error 'Invalid access code. Please try again.' Correct code unlocks Scout page showing Event Concierge and Opportunity Hunter tabs. sessionStorage persistence works within browser session.
features_tested: Scout page (/scout) shows access code popup/gate when user first visits (after login)
Access code input field visible with placeholder 'Enter access code'
Entering wrong code shows 'Invalid access code. Please try again.' error
Entering correct code 'FOMOFAM123' unlocks Scout page
After unlocking, Scout page shows Event Concierge tab with sources
After unlocking, Scout page shows Opportunity Hunter tab with sources
'Back to Home' link on access gate navigates to landing page
Unlock Scout button is disabled when input is empty
sessionStorage persistence - access persists across navigation within session
rca_of_issue: N/A - No issues found. Access gate feature working correctly as designed.
